title: Weak Password
description: The administrator is using a weak password. Find the correct flag.

title: Hidden Linux File
description: A hidden file on the Linux server contains the flag.

title: Base64 Decoder
description: Decode the provided Base64 string to obtain the flag.

title: Suspicious DNS Traffic
description: Analyze the packet capture and identify the malicious DNS request.

title: Broken MD5 Hash
description: Crack the MD5 hash to recover the password.
